overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural medieval village and surrounding farmland during golden hour. The character exits a covered wooden market area into sunlit fields of sunflowers, passing NPC villagers and approaching a small house with a distinctive blue door.

events.description: exits the covered wooden shelter into bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded wooden shelter and emerging into the open sunlight

notable_agents.action: villager in white shirt leaning against the wall
villager in orange hat walking ahead

entered.detail: wooden beam roof structure of the covered market area
thick wooden posts supporting the shelter roof
stone wall of adjacent building visible through the shelter

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered wooden market shelter with moderate crowds of villagers. Geralt walks forward through the shaded structure, passing villagers on either side, and emerges into bright golden hour sunlight at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside stone farm buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path beside a stone farm building, passing a wooden cart

entered.detail: stone wall and wooden door of a farm building
wooden cart with yellow canvas cover parked beside the path
simple wooden post fence lining the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Having exited the covered market, Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path beside a stone farm building. A wooden cart with a yellow cover sits to the left, and simple wooden fences line the path as the landscape opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunflower farmland with distant castle views

events.description: encounter a group of villagers walking along the rural path

agents.ego_description: walking through fields of sunflowers, passing villagers working and walking in the countryside

notable_agents.action: villager in brown tunic walking toward the camera
two villagers in red dresses walking away from the camera

entered.detail: dense field of tall sunflowers lining the left side of the path
medieval castle visible on a hill in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into wide farmland with fields of sunflowers on both sides. Geralt walks along the dirt path, passing villagers going about their business. A distant castle is visible on the horizon to the right, and the wooden fence now lines the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path approaching a small cottage and wooden bridge

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a woman in a dress toward a small house, then continuing past other villagers near a wooden bridge

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking alongside Geralt toward the house
group of villagers gathered near the wooden fence

entered.detail: small cottage with distinctive blue door and thatched roof
trees with white blossoms lining the path
small wooden footbridge crossing a stream or ditch

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a small cottage with a distinctive blue door, walking alongside a woman in a green dress. The path is lined with flowering trees, and other villagers are visible near the wooden fences. The character continues past the house toward a small wooden bridge in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded interior of a village market into an expansive, sun-drenched rural landscape. It begins under a covered wooden shelter amidst crowds of villagers, moving forward through the shade before emerging into the bright, golden hour sunlight. As the camera exits the market, the scene shifts to a dirt path beside a stone farm building and a covered wooden cart, where the environment gradually opens up past simple wooden fences. The path then expands into wide farmland flanked by vibrant fields of sunflowers and a distant castle on the horizon, passing villagers along the way. Finally, the movement leads toward a small cottage with a distinctive blue door and flowering trees, continuing past a woman in a green dress toward a small wooden bridge in the distance.
